# Peroot (פירוט) - Hebrew AI Prompt Engineering Tool

> Peroot is an AI-powered prompt generator built specifically for Hebrew. It transforms raw ideas into structured, professional-grade prompts optimized for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, and other LLMs.

## Key URLs
- [Homepage](https://peroot.space/): Main app - prompt enhancement tool
- [Pricing](https://peroot.space/pricing): Free and Pro plan details
- [Blog](https://peroot.space/blog): Guides and tutorials on prompt engineering
- [Examples](https://peroot.space/examples): Sample prompts and use cases
- [Prompt Writing Guide](https://peroot.space/guide): Professional Hebrew prompt engineering guide
- [Prompt Library Index](https://peroot.space/prompts): Browse 480+ prompts by category
- [Privacy Policy](https://peroot.space/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://peroot.space/terms)
- [Contact](https://peroot.space/contact)

## Product Features
- Hebrew-first prompt improver (RTL-native, not translated)
- 4 capability modes: Standard text, Deep research, Image prompts, Agent builder
- "Great Prompt" structured output with context, goal, constraints, and format
- Clarifying questions (0-3) to refine intent
- Real-time prompt strength scoring
- 480+ prompt templates in public library
- Personal prompt library with favorites and organization
- Smart variables with {placeholder} syntax
- Iterative refinement with Refine and Quick Actions
- Prompt style editor with customizable tone, length, and format
- Prompt chains/workflows with drag-and-drop builder
- Prompt version history with auto-save and restore
- Multi-language voice input (Hebrew, English, Arabic, Russian)
- Keyboard shortcuts (Cmd+K, Cmd+L, Cmd+B)
- Chrome extension v2 with inline enhancement
- Referral program with automatic reward system
- Onboarding email sequence for new users
- Multiple AI engines: GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Groq

## Pricing
- Free: 2 credits/day, public library access, Chrome extension
- Pro: 150 credits/month, all engines, iterative refinement, personal library, 4-day free trial, ₪3.99/month

## Key Facts
- Website: https://peroot.space
- Creator: Gal Sasson
- Language: Hebrew (primary), with English support
- Target audience: Hebrew-speaking professionals, marketers, educators, developers, freelancers
- Built with: Next.js, React, Supabase, TypeScript
